subcodes.first_line: I took up the pen, then, O my God, from Thee and placed the ink before Thee, not knowing what Thou didst desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اخذت القلم حینئذ یا الهی من عندک و وضعت المداد بین یدیک و لم ادر ما ترید
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @martyrs and martyrdom, @humility; meekness; lowliness
